ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., CREATION, BROWSING) */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the action occurred */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page where the action occurred */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "dfa" INTEGER /* Metric for DFA (direct full action) */,
  "dfa_plus" INTEGER /* Metric for DFA+ */,
  "nfa" INTEGER /* Metric for NFA (non-full action) */,
  "nfa_plus" INTEGER /* Metric for NFA+ */,
  "ii" INTEGER /* Metric for II (interaction index) */,
  "ii_plus" INTEGER /* Metric for II+ */,
  "nfa_ii" INTEGER /* Metric for NFA II (non-full action index) */,
  "nfa_ii_plus" INTEGER /* Metric for NFA II+ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website information was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the website (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user information was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the session */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being accessed */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the session in seconds */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User's browser and device information */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* User's IP address */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location (e.g., city, country) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_events" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session in which the conversion occurred */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., signup, purchase) */,
  "conversion_value" REAL /* Value of the conversion */,
  "conversion_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the conversion event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the conversion */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page where the conversion occurred */,
  "conversion_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_views" (
  "page_view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page view */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the page was viewed */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page that was viewed */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the page view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the page */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* URL of the referring page */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_views_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session that came from a referral */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., Google, Facebook) */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium of the referral (e.g., organic, paid) */,
  "campaign" TEXT /* Campaign associated with the referral */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was referred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session during which the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., button click, form submission) */,
  "event_detail" TEXT /* Details about the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the event */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page where the event occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., 'Lead', 'Sale') */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion event associated with the tag */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag assigned to the conversion event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_assignments_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_assignments_conversion_id FOREIGN KEY ("conversion_id") REFERENCES conversion_events ("conversion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "user_session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the user was part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data associated with the report in JSON format */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., user engagement, conversion rate) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
